title: Trump says U.S. is postponing some strikes as it negotiates end to war with Iran
summary_full: The president’s announcement sent markets up and energy prices diving, as investors bet Iran’s blockade of a key shipping chokepoint could soon end.
summary_public: The president’s announcement sent markets up and energy prices diving, as investors bet Iran’s blockade of a key shipping chokepoint could soon end.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iran’s blockade of a key shipping chokepoint could soon end
